texto: When I was poor and complained about inequality they said I was bitter
autor: now that I'm rich and I complain about inequality they say I'm a hypocrite. I'm beginning to think they just don't want to talk about inequality.
explicacao: Citação de now that I'm rich and I complain about inequality they say I'm a hypocrite. I'm beginning to think they just don't want to talk about inequality. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When I was poor and complained about inequality they said I was bitter” articula reflexao, russell-brand, complained em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
